habits.name: Drink Water
habits.goal: Drink 8 glasses of water every day
habits.description: A daily habit to improve hydration and overall health.

habits.name: Morning Run
habits.description: Build cardiovascular endurance by running each morning before breakfast.

habits.name: Read a Book
habits.goal: Read at least 30 minutes each evening
habits.description: Read a non-fiction book to continuously grow knowledge and vocabulary.

habits.name: Weekly Meal Prep
habits.description: Prepare portioned, healthy meals for the week to avoid unhealthy eating.

habits.name: Practice Coding
habits.goal: Solve one coding challenge or work on a side project daily
habits.description: Sharpen programming skills through consistent daily practice.
